_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: FOXR2 knockout and mutation detected cell lines had reduced proliferation and significant reductions in colony formation ability compared to HPRT knockout control cells (t-test p<0.0001)
details: FOXR2 knockout and mutation detected cell lines had reduced proliferation and significant reductions in colony formation ability compared to HPRT knockout control cells (t-test p<0.0001)
